shared_properties: Body footprint stays within 32x48 px and shares the idle torso anchor.
Head crest, eyes, and core silhouette mass stay recognizable as Umbra at a glance.
The same black-plus-teal palette treatment is preserved.
differences: Both arms extend forward to read mirror, prism, or weight-block interaction.
Torso leans toward the object and the feet plant wider for leverage.
Lower wisps compress instead of trailing so the pose reads as a deliberate hold state.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Reuse the player SpriteSheetBundle and enter the grab atlas while the interaction hold input is active.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_grab_4f_10fps.png during Loading and keep it ready for interaction swaps.
runtime_notes: The hands should visually line up with 32 px grid-snapped object centers.
Hold the most extended contact pose as long as the grab input remains pressed.
Do not let the widened stance exceed the logical collider width used for narrow ledges.

context.usage: Interaction pose for dragging mirrors, prisms, and weight blocks across the tower floor grid.

shape.silhouette: Umbra with outstretched arms, lowered stance, and compressed lower shadow mass for pulling weight.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x48 px with four 32x48 frames.
The final contact pose clearly reads as a two-hand hold suitable for mirrors, prisms, and blocks.
Feet stay planted inside the logical ground line so the pose does not appear to float.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.
